notes: Parameter names mirror sequence.components.detector.Detector. Literature source: Craiciu et al., High-speed detection of 1550 nm single photons with superconducting nanowire detectors, arXiv:2210.11644, reports a 1550-nm PEACOQ SNSPD with up to 78% detection efficiency, 158 counts/s dark-count rate, 1.5 giga-counts/s maximum count rate at 3 dB compression, and timing jitter below 50 ps FWHM. The SeQUeNCe time_resolution field is a ps bin size, so this profile uses the conservative upper bound 50 ps. No photon-number-resolving behaviour is modelled or claimed.
